name: swagger-contract-testing
description: Expert assistant for PactFlow and Pact contract testing — consumer-driven contracts, provider verification, can-i-deploy, BDCT, Drift CLI, and OpenAPI spec parsing. Includes specialized agents for reviewing and generating pact tests.

pact_broker_base_url.title: PactFlow Base URL
pact_broker_base_url.description: Your PactFlow or Pact Broker URL (e.g. https://yourorg.pactflow.io)

pact_broker_token.title: PactFlow API Token
pact_broker_token.description: PactFlow API token — get it from app.pactflow.io/settings/api-tokens
